message: ENDPOINT is empty. OpenTools has no documented submission API. Script could not submit. Payload was prepared for: Premium Analysis MCP Server at https://automation.songheng.vip
raw_output:
================================================================

================================================================

  SERVICE:     Premium Analysis MCP Server
  DESCRIPTION: AI-Native Analytics via Micropayments
  SERVER URL:  https://automation.songheng.vip
  MCP TOOLS:   7 premium analytical tools
  FREE TIER:   3 free requests per day per IP (freemium model)
  PAYMENT:     x402 micropayments on Base chain USDC
  WALLET:      0x76eADdEBFfb6A61DD071f97F4508467fc55dd113

  ⚠  ENDPOINT is empty.
     OpenTools has no documented submission API.

  To submit manually:
    1. Visit https://opentools.com/registry
    2. Sign in with your account (Clerk auth)
    3. Check if a 'Submit' or 'Add Server' option exists
    4. Alternatively, use the OpenTools CLI:
       npm install -g opentools
       opentools install <server-name>

  Payload that would be sent (for reference):
---------------------------------------------------------------
{
  "name": "Premium Analysis MCP Server",

  "server_url": "https://automation.songheng.vip",
  "mcp_tools": [
  "data_analysis",
  "content_generation",
  "research_synthesis",
  "financial_analysis",
  "sentiment_analysis",
  "forecasting",
  "insight_extraction"
],
  "free_tier": "3 free requests per day per IP (freemium model)",
  "payment": {
    "model": "x402 micropayments on Base chain USDC",
    "wallet": "0x76eADdEBFfb6A61DD071f97F4508467fc55dd113"

}
---------------------------------------------------------------

  To attempt submission once an endpoint is known:
    export OPENTOOLS_AUTH_TOKEN="your_token"
    export ENDPOINT="https://opentools.com/api/v1/..."
    bash opentools_submit.sh
